name: 5'x7' Braided Area Rug Light Brown/Ivory - Threshold™
description:
Add a sophisticated vibe to your floors with this Braided Area Rug from Threshold™. This rectangular area rug features an ivory-color braided pattern on a light brown backdrop for cool style and versatility. The jute area rug also features a flat-pile construction, making it perfect for high-traffic areas like your living room or entryway.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
